title: 10 - Titan Series Plus™ 48'' Round European Plywood Folding Table and Universal Table Cart Bundle
features: Streamline your event set up and break down process with our bundle of 10 Titan Series Plus™ 48" Round European Plywood Folding Tables and the versatile Universal Table Dolly.
Designed for durability and convenience, this package simplifies your event logistics so you can focus more on guest experiences.
The Titan Series Plus™ European Plywood tables are constructed with high-grade plywood and sturdy metal edging, ensuring long-lasting use.
With a 48" diameter, they comfortably seat up to 6 guests, making them ideal for large gatherings.
The foldable legs and no-veneer finish provide easy storage, transport, and maintenance.
The Universal Table Cart, made from heavy-duty steel, holds up to 10 tables, making transport and storage a breeze.
Swivel caster wheels and a secure strap system ensure smooth maneuverability and safety.
This cost-effective bundle offers a complete solution for seamless event setup and takedown, features discounted pricing and free shipping.
Invest in Titan Series Plus™ European Plywood Folding Tables & Universal Table Cart Bundle from EventStable for a blend of elegance, durability, and practicality.
